titleStmt.title: SII 34.145: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 145. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 12th year, Kārttigai, 8 = A.D. 1263.
Nāvalūr-uḍaiyāṉ Chōti Chiṟiyāṇḍān, a native of Śivapādaśēkharapuram made provision for offerings to the god Tirumāṇikkamalai-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, while the deity is taken to the hunting ceremony.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOlcaṭai paṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷiya
cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 vatu kāttikai mātam 8 tiyati civapāta cēkarapurat
tu nāvalūr Uṭaiyāṉ cōti ciṟiyāṇṭāṟkku Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭai
ya nāyaṉār tirunāḷ tōṟum tiruvēṭṭaikku Ēṟi Aruḷiṉa tirumaṇṭapattu tūṇi patakku Ari
ciyum kaṟivañcaṉamuḷḷiṭṭavai kuṟaivaṟukkumiṭattu muṉ nāḷ policaikku vāṅki Ēṟṟi
ṉa ḷa 9 10 kalam toṇūṟṟu kalamu koṇṭu cantirātitta varai naṭatta kaṭavōm Ātica
ṇṭēcuratēvar kaṉmikaḷōm §
Digital edition of SII 34.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
